title: Is there any way to improve the PDF exports from WorkDocs?
excerpt:
Hi there! 
The export of PDF files from WorkDocs are not OK to send to customers as they are plain text and the formatting is all over the place. Is there any way to improve or customize this so the workdocs can be expor…

posts.author: pdotc (Peter Carlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

The export of PDF files from WorkDocs are not OK to send to customers as they are plain text and the formatting is all over the place. Is there any way to improve or customize this so the workdocs can be exported in a neat way? Thanks…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Peter,

Thank you for your feedback

We certainly hear you and have raised this with the relevant team. They have confirmed that this is something that they’re planning on investing extra effort into this quarter. I will happily follow up incase they have additional updates to share.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @smlmn1389 Steven,
May I ask what kind of customization you need? What do you mean by ‘neat’?
